name: Adult Outdoor Portable Camp Chair - Dealworthy™ Mineral Blue: Steel Frame, 225 lbs Capacity
description:
Enjoy comfy seating during picnics, camping or just chilling in the backyard with the Adult Outdoor Portable Camp Chair from Dealworthy™. This mineral blue camp chair comes complete with armrests with mesh pockets to hold cans or water bottles. Designed with a steel frame, this portable chair holds up to 225 pounds.

Dealworthy™: Just what you need, priced just right.
